title: pilosocereus excelsus
intro: Pilosocereus excelsus, also known as the Stiff-stemmed Pincushion Cactus, is a species of cactus native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain bacteria and fungi. The health benefits of Pilosocereus excelsus include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or salves, which can be used topically to promote skin health and speed up the healing process.
